text: Muninn is a RAG-backed portfolio assistant. It uses build-time local MiniLM embeddings, bundled JSON vector search, Groq Llama 3.3 streaming, and citation chips. It is designed for a zero-dollar monthly operating target.

At runtime, Muninn rate-limits requests, embeds the latest user question locally, searches the bundled JSON vector index with cosine similarity, formats the top retrieval hits as context, then streams a concise answer from Groq.

Muninn builds its memory index ahead of time. The build script reads corpus items, computes MiniLM embeddings with @xenova/transformers, and writes data/muninn-index.json so deploys do not need a hosted vector database.
